summary: Replace the initial simulation_engineer writer for M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 after thread 019f1959-d925-7e83-98f6-5c895c98d41f remained running through three wait windows without REVIEW, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED handoff. tests_run.result: Previous status was running; no REVIEW/PARTIAL/BLOCKED handoff was returned.
Allowed-path implementation changes from the prior writer are present and must be inherited by the replacement writer.

decisions.decision: Close Clockwork and assign replacement simulation_engineer Engine as the sole active writer.
Do not revert the existing allowed-path partial diff; replacement writer must review, complete, test, and document it.

risks.summary: The prior writer changed implementation files without a structured handoff.
risks.mitigation: Replacement writer must inspect the full diff, finish or correct it, run required tests, and create a valid REVIEW handoff before any reviewer can accept.

requested_action: Inherit the existing partial diff, complete M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 within allowed paths, and return a valid REVIEW handoff to historical_researcher.
